params.name: Lucy the Ape
params.description:
On Mar 2, 1974 AD, a scientific expedition team went to the Alpha Delta of Ethiopia to conduct field investigations, and discovered the Lucy the Ape a few months later.
Lucy the Ape was an ancient ape in East Africa who lived 3.2 million years ago. She is roughly 1.1 meters tall and possesses traits of both chimpanzees and modern humans. The fossils of her limbs and pelvis show that at that time, Lucy could not only walk upright, but also learned to climb trees. She died at about 20 years old …
